metadata.title: A20 Constructions | Concrete Pump & Mixer Truck Rental in Morocco
metadata.description: Rent concrete boom pumps (56m & 62m) and 15m3 mixer trucks in Casablanca, Morocco. A20 Constructions brings 10+ years of hands-on industry expertise to every project.

hero.title: Concrete Equipment You Can Count On
hero.subtitle: Boom pumps up to 62 meters and 15m3 mixer trucks, ready for your next project in Casablanca and across Morocco.

fleet.title: Our Fleet
fleet.subtitle: Well-maintained Zoomlion boom pumps on Mercedes-Benz chassis and heavy-duty mixer trucks, ready to roll.

pump1.name: 56m Boom Pump
pump1.description: Zoomlion ZLJ5441THBBE mounted on a Mercedes-Benz Actros. Delivers 180 m3/h with a 56-meter reach — the workhorse for mid-to-large pours.

pump3.name: 58m Boom Pump
pump3.description: XCMG Schwing Tech HB56V on Mercedes-Benz Actros 4143 chassis. 58-meter boom with Schwing technology — a versatile all-rounder for any job site.

pump2.name: 62m Boom Pump
pump2.description: Zoomlion ZLJ5441THBBE on a Mercedes-Benz Actros 4143. Our longest-reach pump at 62 meters — built for high-rise and large-footprint jobs.

mixer.name: 15m3 Mixer Truck
mixer.description: Sitrak mixer trucks fitted with Lin Yu drums. 15 cubic meters per load keeps concrete flowing to your pour without interruption.

services.title: What We Do
services.subtitle: From daily rentals to full equipment sourcing — we handle the heavy lifting so you can focus on building.

rental.title: Equipment Rental
rental.description: Need a pump or mixer for a day, a week, or longer? We deliver to your site in Casablanca and anywhere in Morocco, with technical support on standby.
features: Delivered and set up on your site

sales.title: Buy & Sell Equipment
sales.description: Looking to own? We sell inspected machines from our own fleet and source quality used equipment from trusted suppliers.
features: We walk you through the purchase

sourcing.title: Sourcing & Import
sourcing.description: Can't find what you need locally? We source equipment from our international network and manage customs, homologation, and delivery door-to-door.

about.title: About A20 Constructions
about.subtitle: Built on experience. Driven by reliability.
about.description: A20 Constructions was founded in 2025, but our roots go back over a decade. Our team cut its teeth working alongside major import partners, learning every step of the supply chain — from sourcing to customs to getting machines job-ready. That experience is what lets us deliver equipment and service you can rely on.

experience.title: Deep Know-How
experience.description: 10+ years working with construction equipment and international imports — we know the machines and the market

reliability.title: Zero Downtime
reliability.description: Our fleet is serviced regularly and we show up on time, every time — because your pour schedule doesn't wait

proximity.title: Local Presence
proximity.description: Based in Casablanca, we're close to your sites and quick to respond when plans change

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.subtitle: Need a quote, have a question, or want to check availability? Reach out — we respond fast.

footer.description: Concrete pump and mixer truck rental, sales, and sourcing across Morocco.
